title: Getting Started with Flutter
subtitle: Build beautiful cross-platform apps with Google's UI toolkit.
author: Kishore Kumar

meta.title: Getting Started with Flutter - Complete Guide
meta.description: Learn how to start Flutter development step by step with examples, setup, widgets, and best practices.

content.value: Flutter is an open-source UI toolkit by Google used to build natively compiled applications for mobile, web, and desktop from a single codebase.
To install Flutter, download the SDK from the official website and set up environment variables.
Flutter is a powerful framework for building modern applications. Start building today and explore its rich ecosystem.

faq.question: Is Flutter good for beginners?
faq.answer: Yes, Flutter is beginner-friendly with a rich set of documentation and community support.

faq.question: Can Flutter be used for web apps?
faq.answer: Yes, Flutter supports web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
